# VIIRS Net Primary Productivity Cloud Run Workflow

This chapter documents a cloud-based workflow for generating VIIRS net primary productivity products.

## Purpose

This workflow computes daily and monthly satellite-derived primary productivity products from VIIRS inputs using a containerized Cloud Run Job pattern.

## Repository structure
```text
.
├── CHANGELOG.md
├── config
│   ├── config.yml
│   └── requirements.txt
├── deploy_job.sh
├── Dockerfile
├── entrypoint.sh
├── LICENSE
├── README.md
├── scripts
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
│   ├── control_viirs_netpp.py
│   ├── make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py
│   └── make_viirs_netpp.py
├── src
│   └── __init__.py
└── templates
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl
    ├── nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl
    ├── nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl
    └── nasa_snpp_4km.cdl
```
   
    ## Source files

- [Dockerfile](workflows/viirs-netpp/Dockerfile)
- [entrypoint.sh](workflows/viirs-netpp/entrypoint.sh)
- [deploy_job.sh](workflows/viirs-netpp/deploy_job.sh)
- [config.yml](workflows/viirs-netpp/config/config.yml)
- [requirements.txt](workflows/viirs-netpp/config/requirements.txt)

### Scripts

- [control_viirs_netpp.py](workflows/viirs-netpp/scripts/control_viirs_netpp.py)
- [make_viirs_netpp.py](workflows/viirs-netpp/scripts/make_viirs_netpp.py)
- [control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py](workflows/viirs-netpp/scripts/control_viirs_netpp_monthly.py)
- [make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py](workflows/viirs-netpp/scripts/make_viirs_netpp_monthly.py)

### Templates

- [nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl](workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_noaa20_4km.cdl)
- [nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl](workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_noaa20_4km_month.cdl)
- [nasa_snpp_4km.cdl](workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_snpp_4km.cdl)
- [nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl](workflows/viirs-netpp/templates/nasa_snpp_4km_month.cdl)
